title: rpl/dodag: parent selection logic has triple-nested conditionals
description: In dodag.rs:297-335, select_parent() hysteresis logic uses three levels of nested conditionals with multiple paths returning (best_addr, best_cost). Simplify with: match self.preferred_parent { Some(cur_addr) if cur_addr != best_addr => { let stick_with_current = self.parents.get(&cur_addr).is_some_and(|cur| best_cost > cur.path_cost(mhri).saturating_sub(threshold)); if stick_with_current { ... } else { (best_addr, best_cost) } } _ => (best_addr, best_cost) };
